contents.value: **az** — Azure CLI keyword.
**group** — Azure CLI keyword.
**create** — Azure CLI keyword.
**delete** — Azure CLI keyword.
**list** — Azure CLI keyword.
**az login** — Built-in function/command in Azure CLI.
**az account show** — Built-in function/command in Azure CLI.
**az group create** — Built-in function/command in Azure CLI.
**az vm create** — Built-in function/command in Azure CLI.
**az webapp create** — Built-in function/command in Azure CLI.

A **shell variable** stores a value.
```sh
NAME="value"
echo $NAME
```

A **pipe** sends the output of one command as input to another.
```sh
command1 | command2
```

**Redirection** sends output to a file or reads input from a file.
```sh
cmd > file   cmd >> file   cmd < file   cmd 2>&1
```

A **subshell** runs commands in a child process.
```sh
(cd /tmp && ls)
$(command)
```

**Conditional** execution uses if/then/else or && / ||.
```sh
if [ condition ]; then ... fi
cmd1 && cmd2
```

A **loop** repeats commands.
```sh
for i in 1 2 3; do echo $i; done
while read line; do ...; done
```

A **shell function** defines reusable commands.
```sh
myfunc() { echo "hello"; }
```

An **exit code** indicates command success (0) or failure (non-zero).
```sh
echo $?
```

**Globbing** matches filenames using patterns.
```sh
*.txt   file?.log   [abc]*
```

**Quoting** controls variable expansion.
```sh
"double quotes"  'single quotes'  \escape
```

**Environment variables** are inherited by child processes.
```sh
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH
```

An **alias** creates a shortcut for a command.
```sh
alias ll="ls -la"
```

A **here document** passes multi-line input.
```sh
cat <<EOF
Multiple lines
EOF
```

**trap** catches signals and executes cleanup code.
```sh
trap "rm -f /tmp/file" EXIT
```

Run a command in the **background** with `&`.
```sh
long_task &
```
